title: Your Stakes
description: Manage your ICP Stakes and their configurations

empty.title: No Stakes yet
empty.description: Create your first Stake to start earning voting rewards and participating in governance

setDissolveDelayModal.title: Set dissolve delay for #{{neuronId}}
setDissolveDelayModal.description: Dissolve delay is the minimum amount of time you have to wait for the Stake to unlock, and ICP to be available again. Note, that dissolve delay only decreases when the Stake is in a dissolving state.
setDissolveDelayModal.hint: Minimum {{min}} days to have voting power, maximum {{max}} days.
setDissolveDelayModal.success: You have successfully set a dissolve delay of {{amount}} days.

errors.decreasingDelay: The dissolve delay cannot be decreased.

errors.zeroBalance: You need ICP to stake. Please buy or deposit ICP first.
